creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
Patch looks good to me. No new complaints from portlint.

mail/fetchmail passes 'poudriere testport' on both i386 and amd64 under 11.3 and 12.1 for the following configurations:

  - Default settings 
  - Default settings, build as non-root
  - ssl=base, GSSAPI_MIT
  - ssl=base, GSSAPI_NONE
  - ssl=openssl
  - ssl=openssl with SSL2 and SSL3 disabled
  - ssl=openssl, GSSAPI_NONE
  - ssl=libressl
  - ssl=libressl, GSSAPI_NONE

mail/fetchmailconf passes 'poudriere testport' on both i386 and amd64 under 11.3 and 12.1 with default settings.

Built package works well in my testing.

I approve this patch. Thank you!
